changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: WITH participant_comments AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (response_id) response_id, comment_text FROM feedback_response_comments WHERE is_comment_from_feedback_participant = TRUE ORDER BY response_id, updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC NULLS LAST, id ) UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET giver_comment = pc.comment_text FROM participant_comments pc WHERE fr.id = pc.response_id AND fr.giver_comment IS NULL;
DELETE FROM feedback_response_comments WHERE is_comment_from_feedback_participant = TRUE;
